content:
Administrative Agency: Rochelle Police Dept Incident #: 200600011585 Report No. 1 Entered: 09/23/2006 02:53 By Officer: 00000216 Detective John Kaltenbach
Case_Nr:
On Friday 09-22-06 at approximately 2307 hours I, Officer Kaltenbach #216 was dispatched to 323 Irene Ave. reference a vehicle that had just been egged.
1
On arrival I spoke with , and her mother Abigail. as a translator due to Abigail not speaking very good English. 0 me that a white car with several occupants in it drove by and threw eggs at their truck, which was parked on the roadway in front of their residence.
acted
advised
stated that she was in the house looking out when the white vehicle drove by throwing eggs. stated that after the white vehicle left, she went out to look at the damage, and while inside her truck, the white car came back again and was throwing more eggs at her truck.
I observed several eggs broken on the driver's side of the Herrera's truck, a green 1994 Dodge truck, IL registration 3190LZ. I took photographs of the eggs broken on the vehicle, which I later imported into this case file.
Abigail stated that she wanted whoever is responsible for this to be arrested because this is the third time this has happened to her in the past two days. I advised Abigail and to wash the eggs off as soon as possible, and contact the police department if any permanent damage was observed.
While speaking with Abigail and Officer Gilliam conducted a traffic stop on a white Chevrolet at the intersection of Caron Rd. and 7th Ave. Officer Gilliam advised me that one of the subjects in the vehicle had thrown a carton of eggs out the window. Upon asking the subjects if they had thrown eggs at a green truck on Irene Ave., three of the subjects stated that they did. I advised Officer Gilliam that my PR wished to have them arrested. Officer Gilliam subsequently transported the three juveniles to the police department.
At the police department the three juveniles, were processed on a disorderly conduct ', and
charge and released to their parents pending a juvenile petition.
